name: personalized-federated-learning-for-privacy--preserving-and-scalable-iot-driven-smart-healthcare
description: A Personalized Federated Learning (PFL-HCare) framework for IoT healthcare. Features MAML meta-learning, Differential Privacy (RDP), and gradient quantization for efficiency. Includes a React/FastAPI dashboard for real-time monitoring.
description_ja: IoTヘルスケア向けパーソナライズド連合学習 (PFL-HCare) フレームワーク。MAML メタ学習、差分プライバシー (RDP)、勾配量子化による効率化を実装。リアルタイム監視用のReact/FastAPIダッシュボードを含む。
